footer.description: Vehicle rental in Île-de-France. Quality, transparency and proximity.

hero.title: Rent a vehicle at the best price
hero.subtitle: For your weekend, vacation or moving. Ultra-fast booking, transparent pricing, insurance included.

particulier.title: Rental for Individuals
particulier.subtitle: Weekend, vacation, moving or replacement: rent a vehicle suited to your needs, with no commitment and transparent pricing.
particulier.solutions_desc: Everything you need to drive with peace of mind.
particulier.largeChoice_desc: From urban micro to family SUV, find the ideal vehicle for every need.
particulier.fastBooking_desc: 100% online process, fast and intuitive. Book even at the last minute.
particulier.insurance_desc: Drive with peace of mind, all our vehicles are insured with no deductible.
particulier.noSurprise_desc: No hidden fees. Mileage included, maintenance and assistance included.
particulier.support_desc: Having a problem? Our team is available 24/7 by phone.
particulier.delivery_desc: We deliver the vehicle to the address of your choice in our service area.
particulier.comparison_desc: Compare and make the right choice.
particulier.readyToGoDesc: Reserve your vehicle in just a few clicks and enjoy a stress-free experience.
particulier.contactDesc: Our team is available to assist you with your rental project.
particulier.faqMinAge: What is the minimum age to rent?
particulier.faqMinAgeAns: You must be at least 21 years old and have held a driver's license for a minimum of 2 years.
particulier.faqDocuments: What documents do I need to provide?
particulier.faqDocumentsAns: Valid driver's license, ID card and proof of address less than 3 months old.
particulier.faqCancellationAns: Yes, free cancellation up to 24 hours before pickup. After that, fees apply.
particulier.faqDepositAns: Yes, a bank deposit is taken at pickup and refunded upon vehicle return.
particulier.faqMileageAns: Each plan includes generous mileage. Beyond that, a supplement of €0.15/km applies.

entreprise.title: Rental for Business
entreprise.subtitle: Specialized rental solutions for professionals: fleet, replacement, events.
entreprise.solutions_desc: Everything you need for your business.
entreprise.fleetManagement_desc: Rent a complete fleet for your long-term needs.
entreprise.replacement_desc: In case of breakdown, we provide you with a replacement vehicle immediately.
entreprise.eventVehicles_desc: For your congresses, seminars and professional events.
entreprise.dedicated_desc: A dedicated manager to handle your reservations.
entreprise.transparent_desc: Detailed quote, monthly billing, no hidden fees.
entreprise.fastSetup_desc: Simple contract, service delivery in 24 to 48 hours.
entreprise.comparison_desc: From short-term to long-term, find your solution.
entreprise.fleetDedicated_desc: Access a pool of vehicles reserved for your company, with no capital immobilization.
entreprise.multiDrivers_desc: Add and manage authorized drivers from your professional dashboard in just a few clicks.
entreprise.simplifiedBilling_desc: Single monthly invoice, CSV export and end-of-month payment. Easy accounting.
entreprise.vehicle24h_desc: Need urgent help? We provide a replacement vehicle in less than 24 hours.
entreprise.dedicatedContact_desc: A dedicated account manager to centralize all your requests.
entreprise.onSiteDelivery_desc: We deliver directly to your workplace throughout our service area.
entreprise.formulasDesc: Personalized rates based on your needs and volume.
entreprise.formula1Desc: Employee travel, meetings, seminars. Simplified billing and custom contracts.
entreprise.formula2Desc: Nurses, sales reps, consultants, tradespeople: never let a breakdown stop your business.
entreprise.formula3Desc: Insurance, repair shops, assistance: offer mobility to your clients with our turnkey solution.
entreprise.simplifyMobilityDesc: A dedicated contact, single invoice, vehicles always available.
entreprise.projectTalkDesc: Receive a personalized quote in less than 24 hours.
entreprise.faqCompanyTypes: What types of companies can rent?
entreprise.faqCompanyTypesAns: Any company (LLC, SAS, SA, sole proprietor) with a valid SIRET can open a business account.
entreprise.faqEndOfMonth: Can we pay at the end of the month?
entreprise.faqEndOfMonthAns: Yes, businesses benefit from deferred payment with monthly billing.
entreprise.faqDriversAns: You can add as many authorized drivers as needed from your professional dashboard.
entreprise.faqLongTermAns: Yes, we offer plans from 3 to 24 months with very competitive rates.
entreprise.faqReplacement: How does the replacement vehicle work?
entreprise.faqReplacementAns: In case of breakdown or scheduled maintenance, an equivalent vehicle is delivered within 24 hours.

blog.subtitle: Advice, news and real experiences to optimize your car rental and better manage your travels in Île-de-France.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions.

reservation.title: Booking
reservation.q0: How do I book a vehicle?
reservation.a0: Use our search form on the homepage, select your dates and city, then follow the 5-step booking process.
reservation.q1: Can I book without creating an account?
reservation.a1: Yes, we offer guest booking. You'll receive your confirmation by email.
reservation.a2: Yes, contact us at least 24 hours before pickup for any changes.

paiement.title: Payment
paiement.q0: What payment methods do you accept?
paiement.a0: Credit card (Visa, Mastercard) and payment at pickup.
paiement.a1: Yes, a deposit is held on your credit card at pickup and returned when you return the vehicle.

documents.title: Documents
documents.q0: What documents do I need to provide?
documents.a0: Valid driver's license (minimum 2 years), ID and proof of address.
documents.q1: What is the minimum driver's license validity?
documents.a1: The driver must hold a valid license for at least 2 years.

livraison.title: Delivery
livraison.a0: Yes, we offer delivery service within a 20 km radius of Puteaux.
livraison.a1: Delivery is free in our service areas. Beyond that, an additional fee applies.

devis.accessDeniedDesc: Admin and staff accounts cannot access this feature.
